mapper.select: SELECT order_id ,order_time ,is_paid ,paid_time ,dish_id ,name ,price ,quantity ,is_served ,served_time FROM public.v_orders where table_no= #{tableNo} order by order_time desc, dish_id

select dish_id ,name ,sum(quantity::numeric) over(partition by dish_id) as total_quantity ,order_id ,table_no ,quantity ,order_time from public.v_orders where is_served = 'false' order by dish_id, order_time
mapper.update: update public.t_order_info set order_detail = ( select jsonb_agg( case when elem->>'dishId' = #{dishId}::text then elem || jsonb_build_object( 'isServed', true, 'servedTime', to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) else elem end order by idx ) from jsonb_array_elements(order_detail) with ordinality as t(elem, idx) ), update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
